hero.title: Cap Camarat 7.15 Rental with Skipper
hero.subtitle: Sail to Porquerolles and the Giens Peninsula. Turquoise waters guaranteed! Skippered charter only for a 100% relaxing day.
hero.parking: Large parking lot & EV charging station 1 min walk away

features.title: Features & Comfort
features.sunbed_desc: Perfect for lounging under the Mediterranean sun.
features.dining_desc: Friendly space for your meals at sea under the sun awning.
features.snorkeling_desc: Fins, masks, and snorkels available to explore the seabed.
features.cabin_desc: Space to rest or store your belongings.
features.shower_desc: Rinse off with fresh water after swimming.
features.engine_desc: Ideal power to quickly reach the most beautiful anchorages.

pricing.title: Packages & Rates
pricing.subtitle: Skipper included. NO DEPOSIT. Fuel not included.

contact.title: Ready to set sail?
contact.desc: Contact us to check availability and organize your sea trip.
